FilePlacement: The engines are deliberately placed in `backend/src/engines/` rather than `services/` or `controllers/` to signify that they are pure computational/logic classes independent of REST API routing or React rendering logic.
OwnershipBoundaries: Engines are strictly responsible for core business logic (calculations, heuristics, aggregations, workflows). They must not contain UI layout code (which belongs to `pages/`) or database connection boilerplates (which belongs to `repositories/` or `services/`), though they may accept data objects as inputs.
